title: SeDOA Innovation Lab (SIL) - Your Insights, Our Next Steps
author: de Günther, Sabine
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This poster presents the SeDOA Innovation Lab (SIL) and SeDOA Networking Services – two pillars of the German Service Centre for Diamond Open Access ( SeDOA ).  The SIL functions as a national think tank, observatory and co-design space to test participatory innovations in Diamond Open Access (DOA) publishing. The Networking Services bundle insights from the SIL, the SeDOA Registry and the Publication Services and ensure that new tools, standards and best practices flow seamlessly between the German, European and global DOA landscapes. We invite all stakeholders to share their needs with us via our survey and to participate in the next steps towards designing a sustainable, community-oriented open access infrastructure. 
 Funding: German Research Foundation (DFG), project no. 556323977
